title: libinput bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.26.1-4]
- Fix negative value range for the dial to ring-mapping (RHEL-104952)

[1.26.1-3]
- Support Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd by mapping the dial to a ring (RHEL-104952)
full_text:
[1.26.1-4]
- Fix negative value range for the dial to ring-mapping (RHEL-104952)

[1.26.1-3]
- Support Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd by mapping the dial to a ring (RHEL-104952)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-16435.html
